violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

The pre-flush spray hose at the (prep sink ) is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/11/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

The floors in dry storage have an accumulation of soil residue and/or rodent droppings debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment must apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025
Fly trap was observed hanging over the clean dish drying rack. Establishment is to remove or move fly trap to a location that will prevent contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025

The pre-flush spray hose at the prep sink is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2025

The floor in the dry storage area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings in back food storage area and maintenance closet). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
Milk Cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
Steam table is in poor repair. Inspector observed pool water from a leak. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

Inspector observed outside dumpster area with an accumulation trash and/or other debris. Outside refuse areas must cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

The floors under 3 bay sink have an small accumulation of soil residue and/or rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023
The ceiling in the storage room is in poor repair. Opening observed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2023

The storage room and mop sink closet have an accumulation of rodent droppings, soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
